case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. SANDEY ANDRADE PEREIRA ALVES

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) REPRESENTATIVE ALEJANDRA CHANQUIN, COLLECTIONS AGENT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,616.22 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ALVES, SANDEY ANDRADE PEREIRA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-13-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. REPRESENTED BY ALEJANDRA CHANQUIN, COLLECTIONS AGENT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SANDEY ANDRADE PEREIRA ALVES IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
